questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 以下哪项是完全托管的 MySQL 兼容数据库？
question_text.en: Which of the following is a fully managed MySQL-compatible database?

A.zh: Amazon S3
A.en: Amazon S3

B.zh: Amazon DynamoDB
B.en: Amazon DynamoDB

C.zh: Amazon Redshift
C.en: Amazon Redshift

D.zh: Amazon Aurora
D.en: Amazon Aurora

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon S3 是一个对象存储服务，用于存储和检索任何数量的数据。它不是数据库服务，
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is an object storage service used to store and retrieve any amount of data. It is not a database service,

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon DynamoDB 是一个完全托管的NoSQL数据库服务，适用于需要低延迟和高性能的应用程序。它不是MySQL兼容的数据库，
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a fully managed NoSQL database service for applications requiring low latency and high performance. It is not a MySQL compatible database,

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Redshift 是一个数据仓库服务，专注于分析和处理大规模数据集。它不是MySQL兼容的数据库，
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a data warehouse service focused on analyzing and processing large-scale data sets. It is not a MySQL compatible database,

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon Aurora 是一个完全托管的关系型数据库服务，兼容MySQL和PostgreSQL。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a fully managed relational database service compatible with MySQL and PostgreSQL.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon Aurora 是一个完全托管的关系型数据库服务，兼容MySQL和PostgreSQL。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a fully managed relational database service compatible with MySQL and PostgreSQL.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪种 AWS 服务支持混合架构，使用户能够将 AWS 基础设施、AWS 服务、API 和工具扩展到数据中心、主机托管环境或本地设施？
question_text.en: Which AWS service supports a hybrid architecture that gives users the ability to extend AWS infrastructure, AWS services, APIs, and tools to data centers, co-location environments, or on-premises facilities?

A.zh: AWS Snowmobile
A.en: AWS Snowmobile

B.zh: AWS Local Zones
B.en: AWS Local Zones

C.zh: AWS Outposts
C.en: AWS Outposts

D.zh: AWS Fargate
D.en: AWS Fargate

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Snowmobile 是一种用于大规模数据迁移的服务，主要用于将PB级数据从本地数据中心迁移到AWS云中。它不支持混合架构，
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a service for large-scale data migration, mainly used to migrate petabyte-level data from local data centers to the AWS cloud. It does not support hybrid architecture,

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Local Zones 是AWS提供的一种服务，允许用户在靠近最终用户的地理位置运行低延迟应用程序。虽然它可以扩展AWS服务到本地区域，但它并不完全支持混合架构的概念，
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a service provided by AWS that allows users to run low-latency applications in geographic locations close to end users. Although it can extend AWS services to local regions, it does not fully support the concept of hybrid architecture.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Outposts 是一种完全托管的服务，允许用户将AWS基础设施、服务、API和工具扩展到本地数据中心或其他非AWS环境。这正是题目要求的混合架构支持，
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a fully managed service that allows users to extend AWS infrastructure, services, APIs, and tools to on-premises data centers or other non-AWS environments. This is exactly the hybrid architecture support required by the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Fargate 是一种无服务器计算引擎，用于运行容器化应用程序。它不支持混合架构，
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a serverless computing engine for running containerized applications. It does not support hybrid architecture,

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Outposts 是一种完全托管的服务，允许用户将AWS基础设施、服务、API和工具扩展到本地数据中心或其他非AWS环境。这正是题目要求的混合架构支持，
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a fully managed service that allows users to extend AWS infrastructure, services, APIs, and tools to on-premises data centers or other non-AWS environments. This is exactly the hybrid architecture support required by the question.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务可以运行提供在线事务处理 (OLTP) 的托管 PostgreSQL 数据库？
question_text.en: Which AWS service can run a managed PostgreSQL database that provides online transaction processing (OLTP)?

A.zh: Amazon DynamoDB
A.en: Amazon DynamoDB

B.zh: Amazon Athena
B.en: Amazon Athena

C.zh: Amazon RDS
C.en: Amazon RDS

D.zh: Amazon EMR
D.en: Amazon EMR

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon DynamoDB 是一个完全托管的 NoSQL 数据库服务，主要用于键值和文档存储。它不支持托管的 PostgreSQL 数据库，也不适合 OLTP 工作负载。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a fully managed NoSQL database service primarily used for key-value and document storage. It does not support hosted PostgreSQL databases and is not suitable for OLTP workloads.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Athena 是一个交互式查询服务，用于分析存储在 Amazon S3 中的数据。它不支持托管的 PostgreSQL 数据库，也不适合 OLTP 工作负载。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is an interactive query service for analyzing data stored in Amazon S3. It does not support hosted PostgreSQL databases and is not suitable for OLTP workloads.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon RDS 是一个托管的关系数据库服务，支持多种数据库引擎，包括 PostgreSQL。它专门设计用于支持 OLTP 工作负载。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a managed relational database service that supports multiple database engines, including PostgreSQL. It is specifically designed to support OLTP workloads.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon EMR 是一个托管的 Hadoop 桶架，用于大规模数据处理和分析。它不支持托管的 PostgreSQL 数据库， 也不适合 OLTP 工作负载。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a managed Hadoop bucket rack for large-scale data processing and analysis. It does not support hosted PostgreSQL databases and is not suitable for OLTP workloads.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon RDS 是一个托管的关系数据库服务，支持多种数据库引擎，包括 PostgreSQL。它专门设计用于支持 OLTP 工作负载。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a managed relational database service that supports multiple database engines, including PostgreSQL. It is specifically designed to support OLTP workloads.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望通过安全网络连接为其远程员工提供托管 Windows 虚拟桌面和应用程序。公司可以使用哪些 AWS 服务来满足这些要求？ （选择两项。）
question_text.en: A company wants to provide managed Windows virtual desktops and applications to its remote employees over secure network connections. Which AWS services can the company use to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: Amazon Connect
A.en: Amazon Connect

B.zh: Amazon AppStream 2.0
B.en: Amazon AppStream 2.0

C.zh: Amazon WorkSpaces
C.en: Amazon WorkSpaces

D.zh: AWS Site-to-Site VPN
D.en: AWS Site-to-Site VPN

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Connect 是一个云联系中心解决方案，用于管理客户交互，而不是提供虚拟检面或应用程序。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a cloud contact center solution designed to manage customer interactions rather than provide virtual visits or applications.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon AppStream 2.0 是一种完全托管的应用程序流式传输服务，可以安全地将检面应用程序交付给任何设备，非常适合提供虚拟应用程序。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a fully managed application streaming service that securely delivers hosted applications to any device, ideal for serving virtualized applications.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon WorkSpaces 是一种完全托管的虚拟检面服务，可以安全地提供 Windows 或 Linux 检面，非常适合远程员工使用。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a fully managed virtual inspection service that securely delivers Windows or Linux inspections, perfect for remote workers.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Site-to-Site VPN 是一种网络服务，用于在本地网络和 AWS 云之间创建安全连接，但它并不直接提供虚拟检面或应用程序。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a network service that establishes a secure connection between your local network and the AWS cloud, but it does not provide virtual access or applications directly.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon ECS 是一种容器编排服务，用于运行和管理容器化应用程序，而不是用于提供虚拟检面或应用程序。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon ECS is a container orchestration service designed to run and manage containerized applications, not to provide virtual instances or applications.

answer_text.en: B. Amazon AppStream 2.0; C. Amazon WorkSpaces

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：BC (66%) CD (34%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon AppStream 2.0 是一种完全托管的应用程序流式传输服务，可以安全地将检面应用程序交付给任何设备，非常适合提供虚拟应用程序。；Amazon WorkSpaces 是一种完全托管的虚拟检面服务，可以安全地提供 Windows 或 Linux 检面，非常适合远程员工使用。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BC (66%) CD (34%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a fully managed application streaming service that securely delivers hosted applications to any device, ideal for serving virtualized applications.; This service is a fully managed virtual inspection service that securely delivers Windows or Linux inspections, perfect for remote workers.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望监控配置错误的安全组，这些安全组允许不受限制地访问特定连接端口。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足此要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to monitor for misconfigured security groups that are allowing unrestricted access to specific ports. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?

A.zh: AWS Trusted Advisor
A.en: AWS Trusted Advisor

B.zh: Amazon CloudWatch
B.en: Amazon CloudWatch

C.zh: Amazon GuardDuty
C.en: Amazon GuardDuty

D.zh: AWS Health Dashboard
D.en: AWS Health Dashboard

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Trusted Advisor 提供了安全检查功能，可以识别安全组中允许过多访问的配置，例如开放到所有IP地址的端口。它是专门设计用于帮助用户优化安全性、性能和成本的工具。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option provides a security check function that can identify configurations in security groups that allow excessive access, such as ports open to all IP addresses. It is a tool specifically designed to help users optimize security, performance and cost.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：CloudWatch主要用于监控资源的性能和运行状态，例如CPU使用率、内存使用率等。它不直接提供安全组配置的检查功能。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: CloudWatch is mainly used to monitor the performance and operating status of resources, such as CPU usage, memory usage, etc. It does not directly provide inspection capabilities for security group configurations.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：GuardDuty 是一个威胁检测服务，用于识别潜在的恶意活动和异常行为，但它不专门用于检查安全组配置的风险。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: GuardDuty is a threat detection service used to identify potentially malicious activity and anomalous behavior, but it is not specifically designed to examine security group configuration risks.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Health Dashboard 主要用于提供与AWS服务相关的健康信息和事件通知，与安全组配置监控无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is mainly used to provide health information and event notifications related to AWS services, and has nothing to do with security group configuration monitoring.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (72%) C (23%) 5%。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Trusted Advisor 提供了安全检查功能，可以识别安全组中允许过多访问的配置，例如开放到所有IP地址的端口。它是专门设计用于帮助用户优化安全性、性能和成本的工具。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (72%) C (23%) 5%. Popular discussion and key point summary: This option provides a security check function that can identify configurations in security groups that allow excessive access, such as ports open to all IP addresses. It is a tool specifically designed to help users optimize security, performance and cost.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务是大规模提供亚毫秒延迟的键值数据库？
question_text.en: Which AWS service is a key-value database that provides sub-millisecond latency on a large scale?

A.zh: Amazon DynamoDB
A.en: Amazon DynamoDB

B.zh: Amazon Aurora
B.en: Amazon Aurora

C.zh: Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility)
C.en: Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility)

D.zh: Amazon Neptune
D.en: Amazon Neptune

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon DynamoDB 是一个完全托管的 NoSQL 数据库服务，专门设计为 Key-Value 和文档存储， 提供亚毫秒级延迟，适合大规模应用。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a fully managed NoSQL database service designed specifically for key-value and document storage, providing sub-millisecond latency and suitable for large-scale applications.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Aurora 是一个关系型数据库服务，支持 MySQL 和 PostgreSQL 兼容性，不是 Key-Value 数据库。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a relational database service that supports MySQL and PostgreSQL compatibility, and is not a Key-Value database.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon DocumentDB 是一个文档数据库，专为处理 JSON 数据设计，虽然与 MongoDB 兼容，但它不是 Key-Value 数据库。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon DocumentDB is a document database designed for processing JSON data. Although it is compatible with MongoDB, it is not a Key-Value database.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Neptune 是一个图数据库服务，专为处理图形数据设计，不是 Key-Value 数据库。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a graph database service designed for processing graph data and is not a Key-Value database.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon DynamoDB 是一个完全托管的 NoSQL 数据库服务，专门设计为 Key-Value 和文档存储， 提供亚毫秒级延迟，适合大规模应用。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a fully managed NoSQL database service designed specifically for key-value and document storage, providing sub-millisecond latency and suitable for large-scale applications.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在部署一个机器学习 (ML) 研究项目，该项目需要几个月的大量计算能力。 ML 处理作业不需要在特定时间运行。哪种 Amazon EC2 实例购买选项能够以最低的成本满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is deploying a machine learning (ML) research project that will require a lot of compute power over several months. The ML processing jobs do not need to run at specific times. Which Amazon EC2 instance purchasing option will meet these requirements at the lowest cost?

A.zh: 按需型实例
A.en: On-Demand Instances

B.zh: 竞价型实例
B.en: Spot Instances

C.zh: 预留实例
C.en: Reserved Instances

D.zh: Dedicated Instances
D.en: Dedicated Instances

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：On-Demand实例适用于需要灵活性且无法预测工作负载的场景。虽然它提供了按需使用的便利性，但成本较高，不适合长期运行的任务。 错误原因：成本较高，不是最低成本因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: On-Demand execution individuals are suitable for scenarios that require flexibility and unpredictable workloads. While it offers the convenience of on-demand use, it is more expensive and not suitable for long-running tasks. Reason for error: Higher cost, not the lowest cost option.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：竞价型实例利用EC2的空闲容量，价格显著低于On-Demand实例。适用于灵活的工作负载，例如机器学习任务，这些任务可以容忍中断。 正确原因：最低成本选项，且适合无需特定时间运行的ML任务。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Spot execution instances utilize the free capacity of EC2, and the price is significantly lower than On-Demand execution instances. Ideal for flexible workloads such as machine learning tasks that can tolerate interruptions. Right Reason: The lowest cost option and suitable for ML tasks that don’t require a specific amount of time to run.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Reserved实例适用于长期稳定的工作负载，提供显著的成本节约，但需要提前承诺使用期限（1年或3年）。不适合短期项目。 错误原因：需要长期承诺，不适合几个月的ML研究项目。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Reserved execution instances are suitable for long-term stable workloads and provide significant cost savings, but require an upfront commitment to the usage period (1 or 3 years). Not suitable for short-term projects. Reason for error: Requires long-term commitment and is not suitable for ML research projects of several months.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Dedicated实例提供物理隔离的硬件，适用于需要满足合规性或特殊安全要求的场景。成本较高。 错误原因：成本高，不适合普通ML任务。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Dedicated execution instances provide physically isolated hardware and are suitable for scenarios that need to meet compliance or special security requirements. The cost is higher. Reason for the error: High cost and not suitable for ordinary ML tasks.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (74%) A (26%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：竞价型实例利用EC2的空闲容量，价格显著低于On-Demand实例。适用于灵活的工作负载，例如机器学习任务，这些任务可以容忍中断。 正确原因：最低成本选项，且适合无需特定时间运行的ML任务。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (74%) A (26%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Spot execution instances utilize the free capacity of EC2, and the price is significantly lower than On-Demand execution instances. Ideal for flexible workloads such as machine learning tasks that can tolerate interruptions. Right Reason: The lowest cost option and suitable for ML tasks that don’t require a specific amount of time to run.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪些 AWS 服务或功能为 Amazon EC2 实例提供灾难恢复解决方案？ （选择两项。）
question_text.en: Which AWS services or features provide disaster recovery solutions for Amazon EC2 instances? (Choose two.)

A.zh: EC2 预留实例
A.en: EC2 Reserved Instances

B.zh: EC2 Amazon 系统映像 (AMI)
B.en: EC2 Amazon Machine Images (AMIs)

C.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 快照
C.en: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) snapshots

D.zh: AWS Shield
D.en: AWS Shield

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：预留实例是用于节省成本的定价选项，与灾难恢复无关。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Reserved Instances are a pricing option for cost savings and are not related to disaster recovery.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：AMIs 是EC2实例的备份，可以用于快速恢复实例，属于灾难恢复解决方案的一部分。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: AMIs are backups of EC2 execution instances and can be used to quickly restore execution instances and are part of a disaster recovery solution.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：EBS快照是存储卷的备份，可以用于恢复数据，支持灾难恢复。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: EBS snapshots are backups of storage volumes that can be used to restore data and support disaster recovery.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Shield 是用于保护应用免受DDoS攻击的服务，与灾难恢复无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a service used to protect applications from DDoS attacks and has nothing to do with disaster recovery.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：GuardDuty 是威胁检测服务，用于识别潜在的安全问题，与灾难恢复无关。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: GuardDuty is a threat detection service used to identify potential security issues and is not related to disaster recovery.

answer_text.zh: B. EC2 Amazon 系统映像 (AMI)；C. Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 快照
answer_text.en: B. EC2 Amazon Machine Images (AMIs); C. Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) snapshots

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：BC (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AMIs 是EC2实例的备份，可以用于快速恢复实例，属于灾难恢复解决方案的一部分。；EBS快照是存储卷的备份，可以用于恢复数据，支持灾难恢复。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BC (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AMIs are backups of EC2 execution instances and can be used to quickly restore execution instances and are part of a disaster recovery solution.; EBS snapshots are backups of storage volumes that can be used to restore data and support disaster recovery.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务提供直接从 Web 浏览器对 AWS 工具和资源的命令行访问？
question_text.en: Which AWS service provides command line access to AWS tools and resources directly from a web browser?

A.zh: AWS CloudHSM
A.en: AWS CloudHSM

B.zh: AWS CloudShell
B.en: AWS CloudShell

C.zh: Amazon WorkSpaces
C.en: Amazon WorkSpaces

D.zh: AWS Cloud Map
D.en: AWS Cloud Map

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS CloudHSM 是一种托管硬件安全模块服务，用于加密密钥管理和加密操作，与命令行访问无关。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a managed hardware security module service for encryption key management and cryptographic operations, independent of command line access.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS CloudShell 是一个基于浏览器的服务，允许用户通过命令行直接访问AWS资源和工具，无需安装本地终端。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a browser-based service that allows users to directly access AWS resources and tools through the command line without installing a local terminal.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon WorkSpaces 是一种托管的虚拟检面服务，用于提供远程检面环境，与命令行工具无关。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a managed virtual inspection service that provides a remote inspection environment, independent of command-line tools.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Cloud Map 是一种服务发现工具，用于帮助应用程序发现资源的运行位置，与命令行访问无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a service discovery tool that helps applications discover where resources are running, regardless of command-line access.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS CloudShell 是一个基于浏览器的服务，允许用户通过命令行直接访问AWS资源和工具，无需安装本地终端。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a browser-based service that allows users to directly access AWS resources and tools through the command line without installing a local terminal.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 网络工程师需要创建一个混合云架构，使用 AWS Direct Connect 将本地网络连接到 AWS 云。该公司在单一 AWS 区域中拥有几个 VPC，预计随着时间的推移，VPC 的数量将增加到数百个。随着 VPC 数量的增加，工程师应使用哪种 AWS 服务或功能来简化和扩展此连接？
question_text.en: A network engineer needs to build a hybrid cloud architecture connecting on-premises networks to the AWS Cloud using AWS Direct Connect. The company has a few VPCs in a single AWS Region and expects to increase the number of VPCs to hundreds over time. Which AWS service or feature should the engineer use to simplify and scale this connectivity as the VPCs increase in number?

A.zh: VPC endpoints
A.en: VPC endpoints

B.zh: AWS Transit Gateway
B.en: AWS Transit Gateway

C.zh: Amazon Route 53
C.en: Amazon Route 53

D.zh: AWS Secrets Manager
D.en: AWS Secrets Manager

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：VPC端点用于在VPC内与AWS服务进行私有连接，而无需通过互联网。它不适用于连接多个VPC或扩展混合云架构，
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: These choices are used for private connections to AWS services within a VPC without going over the internet. It is not suitable for connecting multiple VPCs or scaling hybrid cloud architectures,

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Transit Gateway 是一个高效的网络连接服务，能够简化和扩展多个VPC之间的连接，同时支持与本地网络的集成。它非常适合解决题目中提到的随着VPC数量增加的扩展需求，
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is an efficient network connectivity service that simplifies and extends connections between multiple VPCs while supporting integration with local networks. It is very suitable to solve the expansion needs mentioned in the question as the number of VPCs increases.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Route 53 是一个DNS服务，主要用于域名解析和流量路由，与题目中提到的网络连接和扩展需求无关，
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a DNS service, mainly used for domain name resolution and traffic routing, and has nothing to do with the network connection and expansion requirements mentioned in the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Secrets Manager 用于管理和保护敏感信息（如数据库凭证、API密钥），与网络连接和扩展需求无关，
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is used to manage and protect sensitive information (such as database credentials, API keys), regardless of network connectivity and expansion requirements.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Transit Gateway 是一个高效的网络连接服务，能够简化和扩展多个VPC之间的连接，同时支持与本地网络的集成。它非常适合解决题目中提到的随着VPC数量增加的扩展需求，
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is an efficient network connectivity service that simplifies and extends connections between multiple VPCs while supporting integration with local networks. It is very suitable to solve the expansion needs mentioned in the question as the number of VPCs increases.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要评估其运营准备。它还希望在新产品推出之前识别并减轻任何运营风险。哪种 AWS Support 计划可以免费为此类活动提供指导和支持？
question_text.en: A company wants to assess its operational readiness. It also wants to identify and mitigate any operational risks ahead of a new product launch. Which AWS Support plan offers guidance and support for this kind of event at no additional charge?

A.zh: AWS Business Support
A.en: AWS Business Support

B.zh: AWS Basic Support
B.en: AWS Basic Support

C.zh: AWS Developer Support
C.en: AWS Developer Support

D.zh: AWS Enterprise Support
D.en: AWS Enterprise Support

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然AWS Business Support提供了更高的支持级别，但它不包括专门的指导和支持来评估操作准备或缓解风险的服务。这种服务通常属于Enterprise Support的范移。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While AWS Business Support provides a higher level of support, it does not include dedicated guidance and support to assess operational readiness or mitigate risks. This kind of service usually falls under the scope of Enterprise Support.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Basic Support 是免费的支持计划，提供有限的支持功能，例如访问文档和社区论坛，但不包括任何指导或风险评估服务。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a free support plan that provides limited support features, such as access to documentation and community forums, but does not include any guidance or risk assessment services.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Developer Support 主要面向开发人员，提供技术支持，但不包括企业级的操作准备评估或风险缓解服务。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is mainly aimed at developers and provides technical support, but does not include enterprise-level operational readiness assessment or risk mitigation services.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Enterprise Support 提供专门的指导和支持，包括操作准备评估和风险缓解服务，适合企业在重大事件（如产品发布） 前进行准备。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option provides specialized guidance and support, including operational readiness assessment and risk mitigation services, suitable for enterprises to prepare before major events (such as product launches).

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (77%) A (15%) 4%。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Enterprise Support 提供专门的指导和支持，包括操作准备评估和风险缓解服务，适合企业在重大事件（如产品发布） 前进行准备。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (77%) A (15%) 4%. Popular discussion and key point summary: This option provides specialized guidance and support, including operational readiness assessment and risk mitigation services, suitable for enterprises to prepare before major events (such as product launches).

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要制定轮换数据库用户凭证的时间表。哪种 AWS 服务能够以最少的运维开销支持这项要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to establish a schedule for rotating database user credentials. Which AWS service will support this requirement with the LEAST amount of operational overhead?

A.zh: AWS Systems Manager
A.en: AWS Systems Manager

B.zh: AWS Secrets Manager
B.en: AWS Secrets Manager

C.zh: AWS License Manager
C.en: AWS License Manager

D.zh: AWS Managed Services
D.en: AWS Managed Services

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Systems Manager 主要用于管理和自动化操作系统级别的任务，例如修补程序管理、配置管理等。虽然它可以存储参数，但不直接支持数据库凭证的自动轮换功能。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is mainly used to manage and automate operating system-level tasks, such as patch management, configuration management, etc. Although it can store parameters, it does not directly support automatic rotation of database credentials.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Secrets Manager 专门设计用于存储、管理和自动轮换敏感信息（如数据库凭证）。它提供了内置的凭证轮换功能，且操作开销较低。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is specifically designed to store, manage, and automatically rotate sensitive information (such as database credentials). It provides built-in credential rotation capabilities with low operational overhead.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS License Manager 用于管理软件许可证，与数据库凭证管理无关。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is used to manage software licenses and has nothing to do with database certificate management.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Managed Services 主要用于帮助企业管理AWS环境的整体操作，但不直接提供数据库凭证轮换功能。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is mainly used to help enterprises manage the overall operation of the AWS environment, but does not directly provide the database credential rotation function.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Secrets Manager 专门设计用于存储、管理和自动轮换敏感信息（如数据库凭证）。它提供了内置的凭证轮换功能，且操作开销较低。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is specifically designed to store, manage, and automatically rotate sensitive information (such as database credentials). It provides built-in credential rotation capabilities with low operational overhead.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪些 AWS 服务或功能可用于在本地工作负载和 AWS 云工作负载之间创建私有连接？
question_text.en: Which AWS service or feature can be used to create a private connection between an on-premises workload and an AWS Cloud workload?

A.zh: Amazon Route 53
A.en: Amazon Route 53

B.zh: Amazon Macie
B.en: Amazon Macie

C.zh: AWS Direct Connect
C.en: AWS Direct Connect

D.zh: AWS PrivateLink
D.en: AWS PrivateLink

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Route 53 是一个DNS服务，用于域名解析和流量路由，不能用于创建私有连接。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a DNS service used for domain name resolution and traffic routing and cannot be used to create private connections.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Macie 是一个数据安全服务，用于识别和保护敏感数据，不能用于创建私有连接。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a data security service designed to identify and protect sensitive data and cannot be used to create private connections.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Direct Connect 是一种网络服务，可用于在本地数据中心和AWS之间创建专用网络连接，提供高带宽和低延迟的私有连接。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a network service that can be used to create a dedicated network connection between a local data center and AWS, providing a high-bandwidth and low-latency private connection.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS PrivateLink 是一种服务间的私有连接解决方案，主要用于在VPC之间或服务之间创建私有连接， 而不是用于连接本地工作负载和AWS云工作负载。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is an inter-service private connection solution that is mainly used to create private connections between VPCs or between services, rather than for connecting on-premises workloads and AWS cloud workloads.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (70%) D (30%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Direct Connect 是一种网络服务，可用于在本地数据中心和AWS之间创建专用网络连接，提供高带宽和低延迟的私有连接。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (70%) D (30%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a network service that can be used to create a dedicated network connection between a local data center and AWS, providing a high-bandwidth and low-latency private connection.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务用于为 Amazon EBS 提供加密？
question_text.en: Which AWS service is used to provide encryption for Amazon EBS?

A.zh: AWS Certificate Manager
A.en: AWS Certificate Manager

B.zh: AWS Systems Manager
B.en: AWS Systems Manager

C.zh: AWS KMS
C.en: AWS KMS

D.zh: AWS Config
D.en: AWS Config

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Certificate Manager 主要用于管理SSL/TLS证书，用于保护网站和应用程序的通信，而不是用于EBS加密。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is primarily used to manage SSL/TLS certificates to protect website and application communications, not for EBS encryption.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Systems Manager 是一个操作管理服务，用于管理和自动化资源，但与EBS加密无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is an operations management service used to manage and automate resources, but has nothing to do with EBS encryption.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Key Management Service (KMS) 是用于创建和管理加密密钥的服务，EBS加密依赖于KMS来管理加密密钥。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Key Management Service (KMS) is a service for creating and managing encryption keys. EBS encryption relies on KMS to manage encryption keys.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Config 是一个配置管理服务，用于跟踪资源配置的变化，与EBS加密无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a configuration management service used to track resource configuration changes, independent of EBS encryption.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Key Management Service (KMS) 是用于创建和管理加密密钥的服务，EBS加密依赖于KMS来管理加密密钥。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Key Management Service (KMS) is a service for creating and managing encryption keys. EBS encryption relies on KMS to manage encryption keys.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望通过 Web 接口管理其 AWS 云资源。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足此要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to manage its AWS Cloud resources through a web interface. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?

A.zh: AWS Management Console
A.en: AWS Management Console

B.zh: AWS CLI
B.en: AWS CLI

C.zh: AWS SDK
C.en: AWS SDK

D.zh: AWS Cloud9
D.en: AWS Cloud9

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Management Console 是一个基于网页的界面，用户可以通过它管理和监控AWS资源。它完全符合题目中「通过web界面管理AWS资源」的要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a web-based interface through which users can manage and monitor AWS resources. It fully meets the requirements of the question "Managing AWS resources through the web interface".

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS CLI 是一个命令行工具，用户通过命令行界面管理AWS资源，而不是通过web界面。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a command line tool that allows users to manage AWS resources through the command line interface rather than through the web interface.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS SDK 是一个开发工具包，主要用于通过编程方式与AWS服务交互，而不是直接提供web界面管理资源的功能。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a development toolkit mainly used to interact with AWS services programmatically, rather than directly providing the function of managing resources through a web interface.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Cloud9 是一个基于云的集成开发环境（IDE），主要用于编写、运行和调试代码，而不是用于管理 AWS资源。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a cloud-based integrated development environment (IDE) primarily used for writing, running, and debugging code rather than for managing AWS resources.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Management Console 是一个基于网页的界面，用户可以通过它管理和监控AWS资源。它完全符合题目中「通过web界面管理AWS资源」的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a web-based interface through which users can manage and monitor AWS resources. It fully meets the requirements of the question "Managing AWS resources through the web interface".

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 下列哪些是 AWS 云的优点？ （选择两项。）
question_text.en: Which of the following are advantages of the AWS Cloud? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 资本支出的贸易变动支出
A.en: Trade variable expenses for capital expenses

B.zh: 高规模经济
B.en: High economies of scale

C.zh: 只需几分钟即可在全球发布
C.en: Launch globally in minutes

D.zh: 专注于管理硬件基础设施
D.en: Focus on managing hardware infrastructure

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS的优势是将资本费用转换为可变费用，而不是相反。用户无需提前购买硬件，而是按需付费。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The advantage of AWS is that it converts capital expenses into variable expenses, not the other way around. Users do not need to purchase hardware in advance, but pay as needed.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS通过规模化运营降低成本，用户可以享受高经济规模带来的成本优势。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS reduces costs through large-scale operations, and users can enjoy the cost advantages brought by high economies of scale.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS允许用户在几分钟内在全球范围内启动资源，这是云计算的核心优势之一。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS allows users to launch resources globally within minutes, which is one of the core advantages of cloud computing.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS的优势是用户无需管理硬件基础设施，而是专注于应用和业务需求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The advantage of AWS is that users do not need to manage hardware infrastructure, but focus on applications and business needs.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS的优势是按需扩展资源，而不是过度配置以确保容量，这样可以避免浪费。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The advantage of AWS is to expand resources on demand rather than over-provisioning to ensure capacity, which avoids waste.

answer_text.zh: B. 高规模经济；C. 只需几分钟即可在全球发布
answer_text.en: B. High economies of scale; C. Launch globally in minutes

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：BC (94%) 6%。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS通过规模化运营降低成本，用户可以享受高经济规模带来的成本优势。；AWS允许用户在几分钟内在全球范围内启动资源，这是云计算的核心优势之一。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BC (94%) 6%. Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS reduces costs through large-scale operations, and users can enjoy the cost advantages brought by high economies of scale.; AWS allows users to launch resources globally within minutes, which is one of the core advantages of cloud computing.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 架构以最少的停机时间承受故障的能力体现了 AWS 云的哪些优势？
question_text.en: Which AWS Cloud benefit is shown by an architecture’s ability to withstand failures with minimal downtime?

A.zh: 敏捷
A.en: Agility

B.zh: 弹性
B.en: Elasticity

C.zh: 可扩展性
C.en: Scalability

D.zh: 高可用性
D.en: High availability

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：性: 敏捷性指的是快速适应变化的能力，例如快速部署新应用或调整资源。虽然敏捷性是AWS的一个优势，但它与系统在故障情况下的运行能力无关，
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: refers to the ability to quickly adapt to changes, such as quickly deploying new applications or adjusting resources. While agility is a strength of AWS, it has nothing to do with the system's ability to operate under failure conditions.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：指的是根据需求动态调整资源的能力，例如自动扩展或缩减资源。弹性主要解决资源使用效率问题，而不是系统在故障情况下的运行能力，
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: refers to the ability to dynamically adjust resources according to demand, such as automatically expanding or shrinking resources. Resilience mainly solves the problem of resource usage efficiency, rather than the system's ability to operate under failure conditions.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：指的是系统能够随着需求增长而扩展的能力，例如支持更多用户或更大的数据量。虽然可扩展性是AWS的一个优势，但它与系统在故障情况下的运行能力无关，
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: refers to the ability of a system to expand as demand grows, such as supporting more users or larger amounts of data. While scalability is a strength of AWS, it has nothing to do with the system's ability to operate under failure conditions.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：指的是系统能够在故障情况下保持运行并尽量减少停机时间。这正是题目中描述的「能够承受故障并尽量减少停机时间」的能力，
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: refers to the ability of a system to remain operational and minimize downtime during failure conditions. This is exactly the ability described in the title to "be able to withstand failures and minimize downtime."

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (97%) 3%。热门讨论与考点摘要：指的是系统能够在故障情况下保持运行并尽量减少停机时间。这正是题目中描述的「能够承受故障并尽量减少停机时间」的能力，
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (97%) 3%. Popular discussion and key point summary: refers to the ability of a system to remain operational and minimize downtime during failure conditions. This is exactly the ability described in the title to "be able to withstand failures and minimize downtime."

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 开发人员需要以可重复的方式维护开发环境基础设施和生产环境基础设施。开发人员应该使用哪种 AWS 服务来满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A developer needs to maintain a development environment infrastructure and a production environment infrastructure in a repeatable fashion. Which AWS service should the developer use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Ground Station
A.en: AWS Ground Station

B.zh: AWS Shield
B.en: AWS Shield

C.zh: AWS IoT Device Defender
C.en: AWS IoT Device Defender

D.zh: AWS CloudFormation
D.en: AWS CloudFormation

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Ground Station 是一个服务，用于与卫星通信和数据处理，与管理开发和生产环境的基础设施无关。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a service for satellite communications and data processing, independent of the infrastructure that manages development and production environments.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Shield 是一个分布式拒断服务(DDoS)防护服务，主要用于保护应用程序免受攻击，与基础设施管理无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a distributed denial of service (DDoS) protection service that is mainly used to protect applications from attacks and has nothing to do with infrastructure management.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS IoT Device Defender 是一个用于保护物联网设备的服务，与管理开发和生产环境的基础设施无关。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a service for protecting IoT devices, independent of managing the infrastructure of development and production environments.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS CloudFormation 是一项服务，允许用户以可重复的方式定义和管理AWS资源，通过模板化的方式管理开发和生产环境的基础设施。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a service that allows users to define and manage AWS resources in a repeatable manner and manage infrastructure for development and production environments in a templated manner.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS CloudFormation 是一项服务，允许用户以可重复的方式定义和管理AWS资源，通过模板化的方式管理开发和生产环境的基础设施。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a service that allows users to define and manage AWS resources in a repeatable manner and manage infrastructure for development and production environments in a templated manner.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 根据 AWS 责任共担模式，哪一项任务是客户的责任？
question_text.en: Which task is the customer’s responsibility, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?

A.zh: 维护 AWS 云的安全性。
A.en: Maintain the security of the AWS Cloud.

B.zh: 设置防火墙和网络。
B.en: Configure firewalls and networks.

C.zh: 修补 Amazon RDS 实例的操作系统。
C.en: Patch the operating system of Amazon RDS instances.

D.zh: 实施物理和环境控制。
D.en: Implement physical and environmental controls.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：维护AWS云的安全性是AWS的责任，包括物理硬件、网络基础设施和环境控制。客户不负责维护AWS云的整体安全性。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: It is AWS's responsibility to maintain the security of the AWS cloud, including physical hardware, network infrastructure, and environmental controls. Customer is not responsible for maintaining the overall security of the AWS Cloud.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：根据AWS责任共担模式，客户负责配置其资源的防火墙和网络设置，以确保其应用程序和数据的安全性。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Under the AWS Shared Responsibility Model, customers are responsible for configuring firewall and network settings for their resources to ensure the security of their applications and data.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon RDS 是托管服务，AWS 负责管理和修补RDS实例的操作系统。客户无需运行此任务。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon RDS is a managed service, and AWS is responsible for managing and patching the operating system of the RDS execution individual. Customers are not required to perform this task.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：物理和环境控制是AWS的责任，客户不需要负责数据中心的物理安全。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Physical and environmental controls are the responsibility of AWS, and customers are not responsible for the physical security of the data center.

answer_text.zh: B. 设置防火墙和网络。

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：根据AWS责任共担模式，客户负责配置其资源的防火墙和网络设置，以确保其应用程序和数据的安全性。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Under the AWS Shared Responsibility Model, customers are responsible for configuring firewall and network settings for their resources to ensure the security of their applications and data.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪种 AWS 服务有助于为多区域和多可用区架构提供具有快速故障转移的高度可用的应用程序？
question_text.en: Which AWS service helps deliver highly available applications with fast failover for multi-Region and Multi-AZ architectures?

A.zh: AWS WAF
A.en: AWS WAF

B.zh: AWS Global Accelerator
B.en: AWS Global Accelerator

C.zh: AWS Shield
C.en: AWS Shield

D.zh: AWS Direct Connect
D.en: AWS Direct Connect

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：（Web Application Firewall）主要用于保护Web应用免受常见的网络攻击（如SQL注入和跨站脚本攻击）。 它不涉及高可用性或故障转移功能，
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: (Web Application Firewall) is mainly used to protect web applications from common network attacks (such as SQL injection and cross-site scripting attacks). It does not address high availability or failover capabilities,

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Global Accelerator 是一项服务，能够通过全球网络优化流量路由，提供低延迟、高可用性，并支持快速故障转移。这正是题目要求的功能，
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a service that optimizes the routing of traffic through the global network, providing low latency, high availability, and supporting fast failover. This is exactly the function required by the question.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Shield 是一项分布式拒绝服务（DDoS）防护服务，主要用于保护应用免受DDoS攻击。它不直接提供高可用性或故障转移功能，
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a distributed denial of service (DDoS) protection service, mainly used to protect applications from DDoS attacks. It does not directly provide high availability or failover capabilities,

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Direct Connect 是一项网络服务，用于创建本地数据中心与AWS之间的专用网络连接。它不涉及高可用性或故障转移功能，
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a network service used to establish a private network connection between an on-premises data center and AWS. It does not address high availability or failover capabilities,

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Global Accelerator 是一项服务，能够通过全球网络优化流量路由，提供低延迟、高可用性，并支持快速故障转移。这正是题目要求的功能，
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a service that optimizes the routing of traffic through the global network, providing low latency, high availability, and supporting fast failover. This is exactly the function required by the question.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司拥有一套电子商务应用程序。应用程序需要能够相互发送消息。哪种 AWS 服务符合此要求？
question_text.en: A company has a set of ecommerce applications. The applications need to be able to send messages to each other. Which AWS service meets this requirement?

A.zh: AWS Auto Scaling
A.en: AWS Auto Scaling

B.zh: Elastic Load Balancing
B.en: Elastic Load Balancing

C.zh: Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS)
C.en: Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS)

D.zh: Amazon Kinesis Data Streams
D.en: Amazon Kinesis Data Streams

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Auto Scaling 用于根据需求自动调整资源规模，与消息传递无关。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is used to automatically adjust the size of resources based on demand, regardless of message delivery.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Elastic Load Balancing 用于分发流量到多个目标（如EC2实例），不适用于应用间消息传递。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is used to distribute traffic to multiple targets (such as EC2 execution individuals) and is not suitable for inter-application messaging.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon SQS 是一个完全托管的消息队列服务，专门设计用于应用之间的消息传递和解耦。 分送
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon SQS is a fully managed message queuing service designed specifically for messaging and decoupling between applications. Distribute

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Kinesis Data Streams 用于实时处理和分析数据流，不适合应用间的消息传递需求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is used for real-time processing and analysis of data streams, and is not suitable for messaging needs between applications.

answer_text.zh: C. Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS)
answer_text.en: C. Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS)

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon SQS 是一个完全托管的消息队列服务，专门设计用于应用之间的消息传递和解耦。 分送
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon SQS is a fully managed message queuing service designed specifically for messaging and decoupling between applications. Distribute

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: AWS 云服务集成计费有哪些好处？ （选择两项。）
question_text.en: What are the benefits of consolidated billing for AWS Cloud services? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 大量折扣
A.en: Volume discounts

B.zh: 最低额外使用费
B.en: A minimal additional fee for use

C.zh: 一张账单多个账户
C.en: One bill for multiple accounts

D.zh: 分期付款选项
D.en: Installment payment options

E.zh: 自定义成本和使用预算创建
E.en: Custom cost and usage budget creation

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：(批量折扣) - 合并计费允许多个账户共享使用量，从而更容易通到批量折扣的门槛，节省成本。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: (Volume Discount) - Correct. Consolidated billing allows multiple accounts to share usage, making it easier to qualify for volume discounts and save costs.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：(使用的额外费用极少) - 错误。合并计费本身不涉及额外费用，AWS不会因为使用合并计费功能而收取额外费用。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: (minimal extra cost used) - Error. Consolidated billing itself involves no additional fees, and AWS will not charge additional fees for using the consolidated billing feature.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：(多个账户的一张账单) - 合并计费的主要优势之一是可以将多个账户的费用集成到一张账单中，简化账单管理。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: (one bill for multiple accounts) - Correct. One of the main benefits of consolidated billing is the ability to consolidate charges from multiple accounts into a single bill, simplifying bill management.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：(分期付款选项) - 错误。AWS不提供分期付款选项，这与合并计费功能无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: (installment option) - Error. AWS does not offer an installment payment option, which is unrelated to the consolidated billing feature.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：(创建自定义成本和使用预算) - 错误。虽然AWS提供预算功能，但这与合并计费功能无直接关联。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: (Create custom cost and usage budget) - Error. While AWS offers budgeting functionality, this is not directly related to the consolidated billing functionality.

answer_text.zh: A. 大量折扣；C. 一张账单多个账户
answer_text.en: A. Volume discounts; C. One bill for multiple accounts

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：AC (87%) 13%。热门讨论与考点摘要：(批量折扣) - 合并计费允许多个账户共享使用量，从而更容易通到批量折扣的门槛，节省成本。；(多个账户的一张账单) - 合并计费的主要优势之一是可以将多个账户的费用集成到一张账单中，简化账单管理。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AC (87%) 13%. Popular discussion and key point summary: (Volume Discount) - Correct. Consolidated billing allows multiple accounts to share usage, making it easier to qualify for volume discounts and save costs.; (one bill for multiple accounts) - Correct. One of the main benefits of consolidated billing is the ability to consolidate charges from multiple accounts into a single bill, simplifying bill management.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 用户想要在 S3 控制台中查看具有 ACL 和 S3 存储桶策略的所有 Amazon S3 存储桶。哪种 AWS 服务或资源可以满足此要求？
question_text.en: A user wants to review all Amazon S3 buckets with ACLs and S3 bucket policies in the S3 console. Which AWS service or resource will meet this requirement?

A.zh: S3 Multi-Region Access Points
A.en: S3 Multi-Region Access Points

B.zh: S3 Storage Lens
B.en: S3 Storage Lens

C.zh: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)
C.en: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)

D.zh: Access Analyzer for S3
D.en: Access Analyzer for S3

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：S3 Multi-Region Access Points 主要用于跨区域访问S3存储桶，简化跨区域数据访问的配置和管理，与查看ACLs和S3 bucket policies无关。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: These choices are mainly used for cross-region access to S3 buckets, simplifying the configuration and management of cross-region data access, and have nothing to do with viewing ACLs and S3 bucket policies.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：S3 Storage Lens 是一个存储分析工具，用于提供存储使用情况和活动的可见性，但它不用于查看ACLs和 S3 bucket policies。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a storage analysis tool used to provide visibility into storage usage and activity, but it is not used to view ACLs and S3 bucket policies.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS IAM Identity Center（AWS Single Sign-On）用于集中管理用户访问权限，与S3存储桶的ACLs和策略无直接关系。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is used to centrally manage user access permissions and has no direct relationship with the ACLs and policies of the S3 bucket.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：Access Analyzer for S3 是专门设计用于分析S3存储桶的访问权限，包括ACLs和S3 bucket policies，帮助用户识别潜在的公共访问或权限问题。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is specially designed to analyze the access permissions of S3 buckets, including ACLs and S3 bucket policies, to help users identify potential public access or permission issues.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (97%) 3%。热门讨论与考点摘要：Access Analyzer for S3 是专门设计用于分析S3存储桶的访问权限，包括ACLs和S3 bucket policies，帮助用户识别潜在的公共访问或权限问题。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (97%) 3%. Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is specially designed to analyze the access permissions of S3 buckets, including ACLs and S3 bucket policies, to help users identify potential public access or permission issues.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 用户寻找有关 AWS 的合规性相关信息和报告的最佳资源是什么？
question_text.en: What is the best resource for a user to find compliance-related information and reports about AWS?

A.zh: AWS Artifact
A.en: AWS Artifact

B.zh: AWS Marketplace
B.en: AWS Marketplace

C.zh: Amazon Inspector
C.en: Amazon Inspector

D.zh: AWS Support
D.en: AWS Support

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Artifact 是一个专门的服务，提供与合规性相关的信息和报告，包括审计报告、合规性文档等。用户可以通过AWS Artifact访问这些资源。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a specialized service that provides compliance-related information and reports, including audit reports, compliance documents, etc. Users can access these resources through AWS Artifact.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Marketplace 是一个在线商店，用户可以购买和部署第三方软件解决方案，与合规性报告无直接关系。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is an online store where users can purchase and deploy third-party software solutions and is not directly related to compliance reporting.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Inspector 是一个自动化的安全评估服务，用于检查应用程序的安全性，与合规性报告无直接关系。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is an automated security assessment service that checks the security of applications and is not directly related to compliance reporting.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Support 提供技术支持和帮助，但不是专门用于提供合规性相关信息和报告的资源。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option provides technical support and assistance, but is not a resource specifically designed to provide compliance-related information and reports.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Artifact 是一个专门的服务，提供与合规性相关的信息和报告，包括审计报告、合规性文档等。用户可以通过AWS Artifact访问这些资源。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a specialized service that provides compliance-related information and reports, including audit reports, compliance documents, etc. Users can access these resources through AWS Artifact.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务可让公司部署靠近最终用户的应用程序？
question_text.en: Which AWS service enables companies to deploy an application close to end users?

A.zh: Amazon CloudFront
A.en: Amazon CloudFront

B.zh: AWS Auto Scaling
B.en: AWS Auto Scaling

C.zh: AWS AppSync
C.en: AWS AppSync

D.zh: Amazon Route 53
D.en: Amazon Route 53

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon CloudFront 是一个全球内容分发网络 (CDN) 服务，可以将内容缓存到全球多个边缘位置， 从而使应用或内容更接近最终用户，减少延迟。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a global content delivery network (CDN) service that caches content to multiple edge locations around the world, bringing applications or content closer to end users and reducing latency.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Auto Scaling 是用于动态调整资源以满足应用需求的服务，与将应用部署到接近用户的位置无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a service for dynamically adjusting resources to meet the needs of an application, regardless of the deployment of the application close to its consumers.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS AppSync 是一个用于构建数据驱动应用的服务，主要用于GraphQL API的管理，与内容分发或接近用户的位置无关。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a service for building data-driven applications, primarily for the management of GraphQL APIs, regardless of content distribution or proximity to the user's location.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Route 53 是一个DNS服务，用于域名解析和流量路由，虽然可以帮助优化流量路径，但它并不直接负责将应用部署到接近用户的位置。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a DNS service used for domain name resolution and traffic routing. Although it can help optimize traffic paths, it is not directly responsible for deploying applications close to users.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon CloudFront 是一个全球内容分发网络 (CDN) 服务，可以将内容缓存到全球多个边缘位置， 从而使应用或内容更接近最终用户，减少延迟。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a global content delivery network (CDN) service that caches content to multiple edge locations around the world, bringing applications or content closer to end users and reducing latency.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务或功能通过 AWS 全球网络基础设施发送流量来提升网络性能？
question_text.en: Which AWS service or feature improves network performance by sending traffic through the AWS worldwide network infrastructure?

A.zh: 路由表
A.en: Route table

B.zh: AWS Transit Gateway
B.en: AWS Transit Gateway

C.zh: AWS Global Accelerator
C.en: AWS Global Accelerator

D.zh: Amazon VPC
D.en: Amazon VPC

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：路由表是用于定义网络流量的路由规则，决定流量如何在子网之间𪥿外部网络之间传输。它不直接改善网络嬖能，也不涉及使用 AWS全球网络基础设施，
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Routing table: A routing table is used to define the routing rules for network traffic and determine how traffic is transmitted between subnets and external networks. It does not directly improve network performance, nor does it involve the use of AWS global network infrastructure.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Transit Gateway 是一个用于连接多个VPC和本地网络的服务，简化网络架构。虽然它可以帮助管理网络流量，但它的主要功能是连分送接和路由，而不是通过AWS全球网络基础设施提升嬖能，
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Transit Gateway is a service used to connect multiple VPCs and local networks, simplifying the network architecture. While it can help manage network traffic, its primary function is connectivity, distribution and routing, rather than improving performance through AWS's global network infrastructure.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Global Accelerator 是一项服务，通过使用AWS全球网络基础设施优化流量路寽，从而提高应用程序的嬖能和可用嬖。它专门设计用于改善网络嬖能，
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a service that improves application performance and availability by optimizing traffic routes using AWS global network infrastructure. It is specifically designed to improve network performance,

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon VPC 是一个虚拟网络服务，用于在AWS上创建隔离的网络环境。虽然它提供网络配置功能，但它不直接改善网络嬖能，也不涉及使用AWS全球网络基础设施，
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a virtual network service used to create an isolated network environment on AWS. Although it provides network configuration capabilities, it does not directly improve network performance, nor does it involve the use of AWS global network infrastructure.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Global Accelerator 是一项服务，通过使用AWS全球网络基础设施优化流量路寽，从而提高应用程序的嬖能和可用嬖。它专门设计用于改善网络嬖能，
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a service that improves application performance and availability by optimizing traffic routes using AWS global network infrastructure. It is specifically designed to improve network performance,

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务提供高度持久的对象存储？
question_text.en: Which AWS service provides highly durable object storage?

A.zh: Amazon S3
A.en: Amazon S3

B.zh: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)
B.en: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)

C.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS)
C.en: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS)

D.zh: Amazon FSx
D.en: Amazon FSx

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon S3 是AWS提供的对象存储服务，具有高持久性和可用性。它设计为提供99.999999999%（11个9） 的持久性，非常适合存储大量非结构化数据。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is an object storage service provided by AWS with high durability and availability. It is designed to provide 99.999999999% (11 nines) durability and is ideal for storing large amounts of unstructured data.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon EFS 是一个文件存储服务，主要用于共享文件系统，而不是对象存储。它的设计目标是高可用性和可扩展性，但不专注于对象存储的高持久性。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EFS is a file storage service, mainly used for shared file systems rather than object storage. It is designed for high availability and scalability, but does not focus on high durability of object storage.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon EBS 是块存储服务，主要用于与EC2实例配合使用。虽然EBS提供高性能和持久性，但它是块存储而非对象存储。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EBS is a block storage service mainly used with EC2 execution instances. Although EBS provides high performance and durability, it is block storage rather than object storage.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon FSx 是一个专用文件存储服务，支持Windows文件服务器和Lustre文件系统。它不属于对象存储服务。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a dedicated file storage service that supports Windows file servers and Luster file systems. It is not part of the object storage service.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon S3 是AWS提供的对象存储服务，具有高持久性和可用性。它设计为提供99.999999999%（11个9） 的持久性，非常适合存储大量非结构化数据。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is an object storage service provided by AWS with high durability and availability. It is designed to provide 99.999999999% (11 nines) durability and is ideal for storing large amounts of unstructured data.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 当公司在 Amazon EC2 实例上托管其数据库时，AWS 承担哪些责任？
question_text.en: Which responsibility belongs to AWS when a company hosts its databases on Amazon EC2 instances?

A.zh: 数据库备份
A.en: Database backups

B.zh: 数据库软件补丁
B.en: Database software patches

C.zh: 操作系统补丁
C.en: Operating system patches

D.zh: 操作系统安装
D.en: Operating system installations

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：数据库备份 是客户的责任，因为客户完全控制和管理运行在Amazon EC2实例上的数据库。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Database backup is the customer's responsibility, as the customer has full control and management of the database running on Amazon EC2 instances.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：数据库软件修补程序也是客户的责任，因为客户负责管理和维护其数据库软件。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: These choices are also the responsibility of the customer, as the customer is responsible for managing and maintaining their database software.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：操作系统修补程序是客户的责任，因为客户控制运行在EC2实例上的操作系统。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Operating system patching is the responsibility of the customer because the customer controls the operating system running on the EC2 instances.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS 负责提供EC2实例的基础设施，包括操作系统的安装，确保实例可以正常运行。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS is responsible for providing the infrastructure for the EC2 execution individual, including the installation of the operating system, to ensure that the execution individual can run normally.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (62%) C (35%) 3%。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS 负责提供EC2实例的基础设施，包括操作系统的安装，确保实例可以正常运行。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (62%) C (35%) 3%. Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS is responsible for providing the infrastructure for the EC2 execution individual, including the installation of the operating system, to ensure that the execution individual can run normally.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 迁移到 AWS 云有下列哪一项优点？ （选择两项。）
question_text.en: Which of the following are advantages of moving to the AWS Cloud? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 将所有安全责任移交给 AWS 的能力。
A.en: The ability to turn over the responsibility for all security to AWS.

B.zh: 使用即用即付模式的能力。
B.en: The ability to use the pay-as-you-go model.

C.zh: 完全控制物理基础设施的能力。
C.en: The ability to have full control over the physical infrastructure.

D.zh: 不再需要猜测需要什么容量。
D.en: No longer having to guess what capacity will be required.

E.zh: 不再担心用户访问控制。
E.en: No longer worrying about users access controls.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然AWS 负责管理底层基础设施的安全性，但客户仍需负责应用层的安全性和数据保护（责任共担模式）。因此，不能将所有安全责任完全转交给AWS。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although AWS is responsible for managing the security of the underlying infrastructure, customers are still responsible for the security and data protection of the application layer (shared responsibility model). Therefore, all security responsibilities cannot be completely transferred to AWS.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS提供按需付费模式，用户只需为实际使用的资源付费，这是一项显著优势。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS provides a pay-as-you-go model where users only pay for the resources they actually use, which is a significant advantage.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用AWS云服务时，用户无法直接控制物理基础设施，因为AWS管理底层硬件和数据中心。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: When using AWS cloud services, users cannot directly control the physical infrastructure because AWS manages the underlying hardware and data center.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS的弹性扩展能力允许用户根据实际需求动态调整资源，无需提前预测容量。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS's elastic expansion capability allows users to dynamically adjust resources according to actual needs without predicting capacity in advance.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：用户仍需负责管理访问控制，例如IAM权限设置，这是责任共担模式的一部分。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Users are still responsible for managing access controls, such as IAM permission settings, as part of the shared responsibility model.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用即用即付模式的能力。；D. 不再需要猜测需要什么容量。
answer_text.en: B. The ability to use the pay-as-you-go model.; D. No longer having to guess what capacity will be required.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：BD (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS提供按需付费模式，用户只需为实际使用的资源付费，这是一项显著优势。；AWS的弹性扩展能力允许用户根据实际需求动态调整资源，无需提前预测容量。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BD (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS provides a pay-as-you-go model where users only pay for the resources they actually use, which is a significant advantage.; AWS's elastic expansion capability allows users to dynamically adjust resources according to actual needs without predicting capacity in advance.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪项 AWS 服务是混合云存储服务，可让本地用户访问几乎无限的云存储？
question_text.en: Which AWS service is a hybrid cloud storage service that provides on-premises users access to virtually unlimited cloud storage?

A.zh: AWS DataSync
A.en: AWS DataSync

B.zh: Amazon S3 Glacier
B.en: Amazon S3 Glacier

C.zh: AWS Storage Gateway
C.en: AWS Storage Gateway

D.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS)
D.en: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS)

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS DataSync 是一种数据迁移服务，用于快速、安全地将数据从本地存储迁移到AWS云存储。它不提供混合云存储功能，
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a data migration service used to quickly and securely migrate data from local storage to AWS cloud storage. It does not provide hybrid cloud storage capabilities,

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon S3 Glacier 是一种低成本的归档存储服务，主要用于长期存储和备份数据。它不支持混合云存储功能，
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a low-cost archive storage service mainly used for long-term storage and backup of data. It does not support hybrid cloud storage functionality,

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Storage Gateway 是一种混合云存储服务，允许本地用户访问几乎无限的云存储。它支持文件、卷和磁带网关模式
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a hybrid cloud storage service that allows local users to access virtually unlimited cloud storage. It supports file, volume and tape gateway modes

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon EBS 是一种块存储服务，主要用于与EC2实例配合使用。它不支持混合云存储功能，
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EBS is a block storage service primarily designed for use with EC2 instances. It does not support hybrid cloud storage functionality,

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Storage Gateway 是一种混合云存储服务，允许本地用户访问几乎无限的云存储。它支持文件、卷和磁带网关模式
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a hybrid cloud storage service that allows local users to access virtually unlimited cloud storage. It supports file, volume and tape gateway modes
